briefdescription.para: Symbol specifying the offset of local reset reasons in the reset reason bitmask.

detaileddescription.para: Local reset reasons occupy highest bits.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether CTRAP reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether LSREQ reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether LCTRLAP reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether LDOG reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether LLOCKUP reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether MFORCEOFF reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether LPCOMP reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether NFC reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether VBUS reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether CTRL-AP reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether CTRL-AP hard reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether CTRL-AP pin reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether GRTC reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether SECTAMPER reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether DOG0 reset reason is present.
Symbol indicating whether DOG1 reset reason is present.

detaileddescription.para: Reset from pin-reset detected. Reset from watchdog/application watchdog timer 0 detected.
Reset from watchdog/application watchdog timer 0 detected.
Reset from application CTRL-AP detected.
Reset from soft reset/application soft reset detected.
Reset from CPU lockup/application CPU lockup detected.
Reset due to wakeup from System OFF mode when wakeup is triggered by DETECT signal from GPIO.
Reset due to wakeup from System OFF mode when wakeup is triggered by ANADETECT signal from LPCOMP.
Reset due to wakeup from System OFF mode when wakeup is triggered by entering the debug interface mode.
Reset from network soft reset detected.
Reset from network CPU lockup detected.
Reset from network watchdog timer detected.
Force off reset from application core detected.
Reset after wakeup from System OFF mode due to NFC field being detected.
Reset from application watchdog timer 1 detected.
Reset after wakeup from System OFF mode due to VBUS rising into valid range.
Reset from network CTRL-AP detected.
Soft reset from CTRL-AP detected.
Reset due to CTRL-AP hard reset.
Reset due to CTRL-AP pin reset.
Reset due to wakeup from GRTC.
Reset due to illegal tampering of the device.

briefdescription.para: Reset reason bit masks.
Function for getting the reset reason bitmask.

detaileddescription.para: Unless cleared, the RESETREAS register is cumulative. If none of the reset sources is flagged, the chip was reset from the on-chip reset generator. This indicates a power-on-reset or a brown out reset.

simplesect.para: Mask of reset reasons constructed from nrfx_reset_reason_mask_t values.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the selected reset reason fields.
